#Priyadarshinischeme\n\n\nThe Government of Kerala has achieved a historic milestone in women's empowerment with the official launch of the 'Priyadarshini Scheme.' Under this new initiative, women across the state can now enjoy completely free travel on all KSRTC ordinary and city buses.
